title: senecio cleistolepis
intro: Senecio cleistolepis, also known as the glandular ragwort, is a plant species in the daisy family. Traditionally, it has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects. The plant has been reported to have various health benefits, including reducing fever and relieving respiratory issues such as coughs and bronchitis. Senecio cleistolepis can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures for its medicinal uses.
